name: 3267_doubled_matmul
description: Matrix multiply of a with (b + b): output = a @ (b + b). Derived from AKA torch2hip/gpumode/3267_SimpleMatmulModule module_fn.

M.description: Rows of a and the output.

K.description: Inner dimension; columns of a and rows of b.

N.description: Columns of b and the output.

b.description: Right-hand matrix (K, N), added to itself.
